query: NASA Artemis program February March 2026 restructure Artemis IV first lunar landing 2028 Artemis III new 2027 low Earth orbit demonstration Gateway sidelined official announcement
a_issues: Minor: none major; content is consistent and accurate, matches anchor. CSIS snippet correctly notes Gateway pause and new lunar base plan.
b_issues: No source in Content B mentions Gateway being sidelined or the new lunar base plan, leaving a key part of the query (Gateway sidelined) unanswered. Otherwise facts about Artemis III/IV timeline are accurate.
reasoning: Both sets correctly establish the core restructuring facts (Artemis III redefined as a 2027 LEO demo mission, Artemis IV as the first lunar landing in 2028, SLS/Orion configuration unchanged). However, the question explicitly asks about Gateway being 'sidelined,' and only Content A (via the CSIS excerpt) addresses this, stating NASA paused Gateway and is redirecting funds to a lunar base. Content B contains no mention of Gateway at all, leaving that part of the query unanswerable from its results. Thus Content A provides a more complete and accurate basis for answering the full question.
